full_text:
Fu De 伏德
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fu De (伏德)was born in Langye. Brother of Empress Fu, carried her into a boat when they attempted to escape Li Jue. Fu De was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
